strengths: 20+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak: founded GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform, held a startup role at WatchUp (San Francisco), and shipped side projects independently
Recent hands-on AI and agentic infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of formal ML/AI training; the role explicitly prefers a Master's or PhD and recognized AI expertise
Current and historical titles (Staff Software Engineer, Senior Software Developer) reflect an individual contributor track well below the Director-level IC seniority this role requires
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners, shaping cloud/AI platform strategy, or publishing thought leadership at the scale the role demands

key_factors.factor: Entrepreneurial and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: The candidate brings genuine technical depth and a commendably wide engineering footprint across two decades, with green shoots of AI/agentic work in the most recent role, but falls materially short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) profile on the dimensions that matter most: there is no advanced AI/ML academic background, no track record of strategic customer advisory or thought leadership, and the candidate's seniority arc has consistently tracked execution-level individual contribution rather than the director-level influence and platform-scale AI ownership this role requires.
